shortFormVideo.hook: Before you hire a website designer near Melbourne, check these five things.
script: Most businesses do not need a prettier website first. They need a site that loads quickly, proves trust, and turns visitors into enquiries.
Ask for proof, mobile speed, ownership terms, basic SEO coverage, and a clear lead path before you approve the build.
EB28 has the full Melbourne FL checklist at eb28.co/blog.
